description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house surrounded by numerous palm trees and featuring a mix of flat and slightly sloped roof sections. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with large windows and open terraces providing ample natural light and outdoor living space. There is a detached garage or outbuilding adjacent to the main house, as well as a driveway with parked vehicles. The property includes a swimming pool area with a deck, and landscaped greenery is integrated throughout the site. The exterior is finished in a light, stone-like material, complemented by glass railings and metal accents. The overall layout is open and spacious, with clear separation between living, recreational, and utility zones.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, palm trees, a pool, and a detached garage, all set in a landscaped urban lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entry, driveway, garage, and a clear view of the pool and palm trees.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, open terraces, and the relationship between the main house and the detached garage.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back terraces, pool area, and dense palm landscaping.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage, pool, and the open layout of the house with visible terraces and outdoor spaces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and glass railings
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry features a wide door, steps, and a covered porch area with minimalistic columns and landscaping.
